name: ExtensionSubstanceDefinition_Relationship_Type
title: R5: For example "salt to parent", "active moiety" (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `SubstanceDefinition.relationship.type` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`SubstanceDefinition.relationship.type` 1..1 `CodeableConcept`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `SubstanceDefinition.relationship.type` 1..1 `CodeableConcept`
*  R4B: `SubstanceDefinition.relationship.type` 1..1 `CodeableConcept`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `SubstanceDefinition.relationship.type` has a context of SubstanceSpecification.relationship based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `SubstanceSpecification`.
Element `SubstanceDefinition.relationship.type` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: For example "salt to parent", "active moiety" (new)

element.definition: For example "salt to parent", "active moiety", "starting material", "polymorph", "impurity of".

binding.description: The relationship between two substance types.
